name: Web3 & Blockwise Context Initialization (SME_Ang)
description: Empowers OpenClaw/ChickenHawk to deploy the SME_Ang (Web3) minion to autonomously coordinate MCP wrappers for Blockchain RPC endpoints, execute smart contracts within the AIMS architecture, and manage failovers to Agent Zero (AVVA NOON).

mcp_rpc_port.description: The local port to bind the Web3 RPC interface MCP.

cli_tools.description: List of CLIs available to interface the smart contract context (e.g., 'killercode', 'gemini', 'claude').

phases.action: Locate logic in `BoomerAng9/AIMS.git`. Review exact ABIs and block scripts using locally provisioned CLIs (like Gemini or Claude) mapped to Chicken Hawk's overarching logic.
Bind [target_chain] node/testnet wrappers locally via MCP on port [mcp_rpc_port], surfacing JSON-RPC native access back to Chicken Hawk.

Push the execution through the GRAMMAR architecture. If execution critically fails (e.g., contract revert, out of gas), instantly package logs and escalate to AVVA_NOON (Agent Zero) to run the OODA loop.
